title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: KARS 4 KIDS DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Picks up donations of cars, boats, airplanes. Also accepts real estate donations. All donations are eligible for tax credits and receipts will be provided. Website Lakewood, NJ 08701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (877) 527-7454 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 527-7454 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Donation Pickups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
